query:
INSERT INTO as_token_allowance (
                    user_uuid,
                    user_domain,
                    operation_type,
                    remaining,
                    epoch
                ) VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
                ON CONFLICT (
                    user_uuid,
                    user_domain,
                    operation_type
                )
                DO UPDATE SET
                    remaining = $4,
                    epoch = $5
